case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. ASSIGNEE OF HOUSEH VS. ALONZO BOWLEGS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
